title: bidens discoidea
intro: Bidens discoidea, also known as bur marigold or yellow bursage, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the aster family native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Bidens discoidea include its ability to support immune function and reduce the severity of colds and flu, as well as its potential to help manage menstrual cramps and other menstrual-related symptoms. Bidens discoidea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used topically as a poultice or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
